title: Barbie Sparkle Lights Toy Unicorn with 20 Interactive Combos of Lights, Sounds & Music, Press Buttons & Pet Head to Play, JCP78
seller_info_text: Sold by Amazon Resale and Fulfilled by Amazon.
features: Barbie Sparkle Lights Unicorn shimmers and shines with lights, sounds, and music!
Kids can spark 20 different light and sound combinations with so many ways to play.
'Pet' the unicorn's head for a brilliant display of lights, sounds, and music!
Press 1, 2, or 3 buttons on the unicorn for a customizable, shimmering show of lights and sounds!
The button colors match the pink, yellow, and blue lights so little ones can customize the color combinations for their own unique unicorn light show!
Kids ages 3 years old and up can shine bright with Barbie Sparkle Lights Unicorn.
description: From the manufacturer Barbie Sparkle Lights Unicorn comes to life with 20 different light and sound combinations! Kids can “pet” the unicorn’s head to activate the lights, sounds and music for a wow moment! Customize the colors of the light show - the button matches the color of the light.
